In a sauce pan over high heat add shallots, garlic, and truffle peelings; sweat until tender
add remaining ingredients except water and reduce by half
once reduced by half, puree in a vitamix blender and add water as necessary to create a smooth paste
Reserve in quart containers and cool in the blast chiller or ice bath
Store in the cooler
